description: The Hornec gang is a Gitanes criminal group from the Paris region, led by three brothers from Montreuil. It controls racketeering, drug dealing, and illegal slot machines in Paris, with connections to the Corsican mafia and Maghrebian gangs. The gang rose after the 1994 assassination of crime boss Claude Genova and became the most influential in Paris, but its influence declined after arrests in 2006.
